title: astragalus penduliflorus var. purpurinus
intro: Astragalus penduliflorus var. purpurinus, also known as purple milk vetch, is a plant species in the legume family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of purple milk vetch include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Purple milk vetch is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or extract, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
